narrative:
Madison County has 27,077 registered voters, with 53.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.5 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 28.1% of registrants.
